name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: At 236 SW 107th Ave, Miami, FL 33174, you can reach Value Pawn & Jewelry at +1 305-553-6863.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a full-service pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the local community by providing immediate cash solutions through collateral-based lending and merchandise sales. The store has been established as a neighborhood pawn resource offering both financial services and retail shopping options.

The company's primary service is pawn loans, where customers bring items in working condition and receive immediate cash based on assessed value. Beyond pawning, Value Pawn & Jewelry specializes in gold and diamond jewelry buying, with trained appraisers who test precious metals to determine fair market value. They maintain an extensive inventory of pre-owned brand-name merchandise, including electronics (Samsung HDTVs, Apple smartphones), tools, gaming equipment, musical instruments, handbags, and sneakers—all discounted 25-70% below retail. Additional services include layaway options (10% down with monthly payments), "Take Today" third-party financing (up to 12 months), an online shop with daily inventory updates, and an EZ+ Rewards program that awards points on eligible transactions.

Value Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through several specific offerings: an "Instant Quote" tool for electronics that provides same-day estimates online, specialized jewelry protection through a Jewelry VIP Program (with guaranteed loan amounts and lifetime enrollment options), a Product Protection Plan for electronics and merchandise, and explicit handling of firearms and auto loans (services noted as available at this location). The store operates extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) and emphasizes community commitment and respectful service.

As a pawn shop, Value Pawn & Jewelry fills a legitimate consumer finance gap for those needing immediate cash or affordable pre-owned goods, but comes with inherent limitations. Pawn loans are short-term solutions with fees and terms that borrowers must understand. The company's focus on merchandise sales and collateral-based lending means it cannot serve consumers seeking traditional credit-building products, debt relief, or unsecured personal loans. Success depends on having items of value to pledge and understanding that nonpayment results in forfeiture of collateral.
pros: Instant cash available same-day based on item valuation with no credit check required
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed future loan amounts and 100% trade-up value on jewelry purchases
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics eliminates guesswork and speeds up the quoting process
Extensive daily inventory with 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics and merchandise
EZ+ Rewards Program awards points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party financing up to 12 months
Extended store hours (open until 7pm weekdays) accommodate working customers and emergency cash needs
Expert gold and diamond appraisals with fair-market pricing for precious metals of any karat
cons: Pawn loans are subject to undisclosed fees and terms; borrowers forfeit collateral if unable to repay
Limited transparency on interest rates, APR, and specific loan terms visible on website
Third-party financing and certain services explicitly unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Pre-owned merchandise means no manufacturer warranties or guarantees on most items sold
Not suitable for consumers seeking unsecured credit or credit-building products
best_for: Consumers with immediate short-term cash needs who own items of value (electronics, jewelry, tools)
Budget shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics and fashion items
Gold and jewelry sellers wanting expert appraisals and fair-market pricing for precious metals
Buyers wanting flexible payment plans (layaway or financing) on mid-ticket purchases
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for consumers who own valuable items and need immediate cash without credit checks, or who seek deeply discounted pre-owned merchandise. The key caveat is that pawn loans are short-term collateral-based products with forfeiture risk and undisclosed fee structures—not replacements for traditional credit or long-term borrowing solutions.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition with immediate cash payout
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with precious metal testing and appraisal
Instant Quote online tool for electronics valuation
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise (electronics, tools, gaming, fashion, handbags)
Layaway with 10% down and affordable monthly payment plans
Third-party "Take Today" financing (up to 12 months, subject to credit eligibility)
Online shop with daily new arrivals and inventory browsing
EZ+ Rewards Program with points redemption on eligible transactions
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and lifetime enrollment
Product Protection Plan for electronics and merchandise coverage
Firearms services (noted as available at this location)
Auto loans (noted as available at this location)
